hooks.command: PY="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.venv/Scripts/python.exe"; [ -x "$PY" ] || PY="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.venv/bin/python"; [ -x "$PY" ] || PY="$(command -v python3 2>/dev/null || command -v python 2>/dev/null || true)"; [ -n "$PY" ] && exec "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.claude/hooks/guard_force_push.py" || exit 0
